channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: TMC - Defects - Footways Slabs problem, 9th June
item.description:
Unstable Slab FW 1 x 400mm x 400mm Tactile Give and take TM With Temporary FW Closure Stats required (FW Rocking/Unstable Slab)
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Tree is damaged problem, 9th June
item.description:
PERM Please can a inquiry ref be raised for a Perm Repair for the Arbs Team Details are as follows: Previous Job Number: 42659813 Address: 3/156 Glebelands To Penhill Farm, Next To Wooden Fence, Colesbourne. USRN: 9400965 Job Description: Damaged Tree Branch made safe with Road Closure -Requires Arbs Team.
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: TMC - Defects -FW6 Potholes problem, 9th June
item.description:
Pothole FW in hours 2hr Emergency 300mm x 300mm possible sink hole Give and take TM With Temporary FW Closure MAKE SAFE ONLY ENQUIRY RAISED FOR AHR TO INVESTIGATE (FW6 Pothole)
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Trees/shrubs blocking footpath, 9th June
item.description:
Trees/shrubs are partly blocking the footpath on Fiddlers Green Lane from entrance to Meadow Close up to the mini roundabout with Telstar Way. Difficult for two people to pass each other satisfactorily without having to step off the pavement or avoid continuously parked cars along that side.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Fiddlers Green Lane, Hatherley, Cheltenham, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Overhanging tree causing obstruction, 9th June
item.description:
Tree on cycle/pathway near B and Q entrance/exit is causing cyclists and walkers to duck under overhanging branches

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Grovefield Way, Hatherley, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Large area of tarmac missing, 9th June
item.description:
On the exit from GCHQ onto Telstar Way, partly covering the Give Way road markings.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Telstar Way, Hatherley, Cheltenham, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Large area of tarmac missing, 9th June
item.description:
The area is on Telstar Way just outside GCHQ bus exit towards the junction with the A40, as you aproach the roundabout from Fiddlers Green Lane.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Telstar Way, Hatherley, Cheltenham, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Swathes of long grass/weeds in all verges in the area, 9th June
item.description:
Not been cut for weeks
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 36, Bibury Road, Hatherley, Cheltenham, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Gate is padlocked and fake signs are used, 9th June
item.description:
On the edge of the tree area from the farmer’s field to the footpath which leads to the car park. Fake footpath signs, padlocked gate, totally overgrown path with weeds and nettles.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): A40, Cotswold
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Farmer has used fake footpath signs to divert, 9th June
item.description:
The footpath over the field is diverted in multiple places using fake yellow arrows and clearly does not match the originals, some of which remain but are partly hidden
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Gloucester Road, Cotswold
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Overgrown grass on Farmfield Road, 9th June
item.description:
The grass around the road on Farmfield road is overgrown in general but particular on the corner of Farmfield Road and Lincoln Avenue. After the recent resurfacing of the road, the crew left some leftovers there which are now totally hidden due to the long grass and are a potential hazard.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 124, Farmfield Road, Warden Hill, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: TMC - Defects - Kerbs and Channels problem, 9th June
item.description:
Kerbing Defects FW 1 x 550mm Road Closure TM With Temporary FW Closure Stats required (FW Kerbing Defects)
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: TMC - Defects - Kerbs and Channels problem, 9th June
item.description:
Kerbing Defects FW 1 x 900mm Road Closure TM With Temporary FW Closure Stats required (FW Kerbing Defects)
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: TMC - Defects - Footways Slabs problem, 9th June
item.description:
Broken Slab FW 1 x 400mm x 280mm Tactile Give and take TM With Temporary FW Closure Stats required Cutting Required (FW Broken Slabs)
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: TMC - Defects - Footways Slabs problem, 9th June
item.description:
Unstable Slab FW 1 x 400mm Tactile Give and take TM With Temporary FW Closure Stats required (FW Rocking/Unstable Slab)
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Farmer has clearly left weeds to over grow and left farm equipment around edge of grass to prevent easy crossing, 9th June
item.description:
Immediately in front of the footpath marker illustrated

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Cotswold
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Overgrown footpath, 9th June
item.description:
Hi Team, I have had concerns raised about a number of footpaths alongside main roads which have not been cut. To mention a few are Roman Road and Lobleys Drive where residents are struggling to use the pavements as a result of the overgrowth. Please could this be actioned asap. Thank you in advance.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Hadrians Way, Hucclecote, Gloucester
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: TMC - Defects - Footways Slabs problem, 9th June
item.description:
Broken Slab FW 1 x 600mm x 450mm Give and take TM With Temporary FW Closure Stats required (FW Broken Slabs)
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: TMC - Defects - Other FW6 Surface problem, 9th June
item.description:
Abrupt Level Difference FW 400mm x 400mm x 30mm Give and take TM With Temporary FW Closure Stats required Fill redundant Bollard cover (FW6 Abrupt Level Differences)
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: TMC - Defects - Other FW6 Surface problem, 9th June
item.description:
Abrupt Level Difference FW ENWD 400mm x 400mm x 30mm Give and take TM With Temporary FW Closure Stats required Fill redundant Bollard cover (FW6 Abrupt Level Differences)
Report on FixMyStreet
